channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: The Lenacapavir Partnership and the Evolution of U.S. Foreign Assistance | The Futures Summit
item.description: Experts discussed the partnership between the State Department, Gilead Sciences, and the Global Fund to Fight AIDS, Tuberculosis and Malaria to procure and deliver Lenacapavir—a groundbreaking twice-yearly injectable pre-exposure prophylaxis (PrEP) for HIV prevention.

item.title: The Way Forward for Global Health | The Futures Summit
item.description: Experts discussed how the funding environment for global health has shifted internationally, how they are focusing their organizations’ priorities as the world moves more fully into a post-Covid moment, and what innovations they are most excited to deliver in the years ahead.
